expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: skill improvements for report-editor do not regress a different feature planning flow
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the check: "ensuring that improvements made for the report-editor feature family... do not regress a different feature planning flow" and explains the preserved alternative flow: "This is the key cross-feature holdout regression point: report-editor improvements must not erase or break the alternative 'shell/migration/regression-first' planning flow." It then concludes PASS with rationale that Plan 2's flow is "not discarded" but "preserved as a set of importable strengths."

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: result.md declares "Primary phase under test: holdout" and the content is structured as a holdout regression check using the specified fixture ("Evidence used (holdout_regression fixture) ... compare-result.md"), culminating in a "Holdout regression verdict (blocking)". execution_notes.md also frames the run as "Evaluated the provided holdout_regression fixture for cross-feature planning-flow regression risk."
